ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coffees" (
  "coffee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coffee product */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Slug used for URL routing of the coffee product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coffee product */,
  "roaster" TEXT /* Name of the roaster or brand that produces the coffee */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Average rating of the coffee product */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Geographic origin of the coffee */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation at which the coffee is grown */,
  "processing_method" TEXT /* Method used to process the coffee beans */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Detailed tasting notes provided by the roaster */,
  "roast_date" TEXT /* Date when the coffee was roasted */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the coffee product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the coffee product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the coffee product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coffee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "coffee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user in the review */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Whether the user recommends the coffee */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_coffee_id FOREIGN KEY ("coffee_id") REFERENCES coffees ("coffee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, reviewer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is verified */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "coffee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee product rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review associated with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_coffee_id FOREIGN KEY ("coffee_id") REFERENCES coffees ("coffee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coffee_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the coffee category (e.g., Espresso, Filter, Cold Brew) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coffee_category_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category assignment */,
  "coffee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_category_assignments_coffee_id FOREIGN KEY ("coffee_id") REFERENCES coffees ("coffee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_category_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES coffee_categories ("category_id")
)
